app.title: NovaStory · Storyboard Experiment
app.subtitle: Study of automation vs. personal voice in human-AI co-creation

sidebar.api_no_configs: No API presets found. Add at least one [[api_configs]] block to .streamlit/secrets.toml (see secrets.toml.example).
sidebar.api_key_missing: This preset has no API Key — fill it in .streamlit/secrets.toml.
sidebar.frozen_hint: Subject has started — topic fields are locked.

onboarding.title: Subject onboarding
onboarding.hint: Researcher: confirm the API and topic settings in the sidebar, then enter a Subject ID, assign a flow, and start.
onboarding.topic_spec: {count} shots · {total}s total (AI decides each shot's length)
onboarding.flow_label: Assign a flow to this subject (click a button to start)

group_a.title: Group A · Pure manual writing
group_a.instructions: Write a storyboard by hand: {shot_count} shots totalling {total_seconds}s. You decide each shot's length — close-ups can be short, action/dialogue can be longer — but the durations must sum to {total_seconds}s. Include visuals and dialogue/SFX.
group_a.seed_label: In one sentence, summarize the creative hook of what you just wrote (it will seed the later AI groups).
group_a.seed_placeholder: e.g. an all-nighter slacker's desperate self-rescue

group_b.title: Group B · Low automation
group_b.instructions: Tweak the creative hook (default carried over from A) and add a prompt for the AI. The AI will produce a full {shot_count}-shot script. Re-generate if unhappy — only the last version is kept.
group_b.prompt_label: Extra prompt for the AI (style, pacing, dialogue preference, …)
group_b.prompt_placeholder: e.g. absurd-comedy style, more inner monologue, less dialogue

group_c.title: Group C · One-click auto generation
group_c.instructions: Your creative hook is locked. Click once to generate the {shot_count}-shot script directly.

group_d.title: Group D · Mid-outline intervention
group_d.instructions: AI first writes a {shot_count}-sentence outline; you may freely edit, override, or inject your own jokes in the text box, then generate the final script.
group_d.outline_hint: Rewrite the outline here — inject your personal twist.

done.title: Experiment complete 🎉
done.message: All groups submitted for this subject. Data written to CSV.

researcher.title: Researcher dashboard
researcher.empty: No data yet — waiting for the first submission.

llm.log_hint: Full log is at data/llm.log (run `tail -f data/llm.log` in another terminal).

errors.no_api_key: Please enter an API Key in the sidebar first.
errors.topic_required: Please configure the experiment topic in the sidebar.
errors.locked_prev_step: Please finish and submit the previous step first.
errors.outline_empty: Outline is empty — please generate or write one first.
